text:
The variable will be blank for beneficiaries that have never had the condition. 

SHORT NAME: SPIINJ_MEDICARE_EVER 

LONG NAME: SPIINJ_MEDICARE_EVER 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: The earliest possible date for anyone in the CCW is January 1, 1999. If the beneficiary became eligible 
for Medicare after that, the earliest possible date will be some time after his/her coverage start date 
(i.e., the COVSTART variable in the beneficiary file).
